cells.rationale: Dependency-free discriminated-union contract every other task consumes; infra-can-never-typecheck-as-green is a propagating abstraction.
Sibling to ensureWorktree on the existing GitRunner seam — known template, but the lane-collision-prefix risk needs care.
Daemon-blast-radius process lifecycle: process-group kill/reap-no-zombies, deadline abort, coalescing, crash-loop containment — many interacting edge cases where deeper reasoning lifts correctness.
House-registration verb consuming task-1's contract; bounded spool-write + wait-poll with clear exit-code acceptance.
Multi-artifact regen (skill + four manifests + oracle fixture) under strict CLAUDE.md size/re-narration gates and forward-facing doc discipline; subtle-failure-prone despite being prose.
